general_inquiry.question: Find all real solutions to $\sqrt{\frac{25 x}{4}-\frac{25}{4}}+\sqrt{\frac{29 x}{2}-\frac{29}{2}}=\frac{7}{2}$ Do not show work just give me the final answer!!!
general_inquiry.response: The real solution to the equation \(\sqrt{\frac{25x}{4} - \frac{25}{4}} + \sqrt{\frac{29x}{2} - \frac{29}{2}} = \frac{7}{2}\) is \(\boxed{2}\).
